zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien於1225年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫時，她的父親Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien27歲，母親Alix van Zotteghem27歲。她於1247年與GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien于1225年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫时，她的父亲Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien27岁，母亲Alix van Zotteghem27岁。她于1247年与GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien was born in 1225, in East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien, was 27 and her mother, Alix van Zotteghem, was 27. She married GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz in 1247. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1264, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien est née en 1225, à Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alix van Zotteghem, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz en 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1264, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien 1225 in Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien 27 und ihre Mutter Alix van Zotteghem 27. Sie hat 1247 GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1264 im Alter von 39 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien è nata il nel 1225 nel Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Alix van Zotteghem, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz nel 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1264, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghienが1225年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンで生まれた時，父Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghienは27歳，母Alix van Zotteghemは27歳であった。1247年にGILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien(이)가 1225년 벨기에 스트-블라아더에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix van Zotteghem(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1247년 GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien nasceu em 1225, em Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alix van Zotteghem, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz em 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1264, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien родилась в 1225 г. в местности уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix van Zotteghem, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz в 1247 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1264 г. в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida Anne Agnes D'Enghien nació en 1225, en Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alix van Zotteghem, tenía 27 años. Se casó con GILLES de TRAZEIGNIES , de Irchonwelz en 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1264, a la edad de 39 años.
